subject in soprano: stepwise chromatic descent from f#5 through a series of sighing melodic gestures, culminating on g#4 with trill; highly chromatic, expressive, spanning a minor sixth"},{"id":"Answer (Tonal)","bar_start":4,"bar_end":6,"description":"Tonal answer of subject in alto/tenor at the dominant (f#), beginning on c#5; accompanies countersubject in soprano"},{"id":"Countersubject I","bar_start":4,"bar_end":6,"description":"First countersubject: flowing eighth-note figuration in contrary motion to subject, saturated with chromatic passing tones"},{"id":"Subject (Bass entry)","bar_start":9,"bar_end":11,"description":"Subject appears in bass voice for first time, transposed to B minor tonic, marking completion of exposition"},{"id":"Episode I","bar_start":12,"bar_end":18,"description":"Modulatory episode employing sequences of invertible counterpoint and chromatic motion, steering from b minor toward f# major"},{"id":"Middle Entry Group I","bar_start":19,"bar_end":24,"description":"Subject entries in A major / relative major region, with invertible counterpoint between voices"},{"id":"Episode II","bar_start":25,"bar_end":32,"description":"Sequential episode with chromatic sequences through e minor; features stretto-like imitation and invertible counterpoint"},{"id":"Middle Entry Group II","bar_start":33,"bar_end":42,"description":"Return of subject in b minor with close stretto and increased contrapuntal density"},{"id":"Episode III","bar_start":43,"bar_end":56,"description":"Extended modulatory episode traversing d major, g minor, and c# minor; highly chromatic, with sequences in all four voices"},{"id":"Stretto Section","bar_start":57,"bar_end":74,"description":"Compressed stretto entries of subject in all voices with increased rhythmic density; chromatic intensification leads to dominant preparation"},{"id":"Final Cadence (5 voices)","bar_start":75,"bar_end":76,"description":"Texture expands to five voices; conclusive perfect authentic cadence in B minor with full harmonic support"}]}
